content.problemStatement: Fix the error in the code provided.
constraints: Array size is fixed at 5 elements.
Array elements are fixed integers from 1 to 5.
content.outputFormat: Print the elements of the fixed array separated by spaces on a single line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The fixed array is printed once.
No input means the same output for every run.
Repeated sample to emphasize deterministic output.

solution.approach: The problem does not require any computation. The array is predefined as [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]. The solution simply iterates over the five elements, prints each value separated by a single space, and terminates the line with a newline character. No input is read, and the algorithm runs in constant time.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – only five constant‑time operations are performed.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a fixed‑size array of five integers is stored.
